subject: [PATCH v3 14/20] gfs2: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for the GFS2 file system to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated using a macro that wraps the iomap_iter_next() helper and finishes previous mappings as needed. This change does not introduce any functional changes, but rather updates the code to conform to the latest kernel interface. The patch modifies the gfs2_iomap_ops structure to use the new ->iomap_next() callback instead of the old ->iomap_begin() and ->iomap_end() callbacks.
